title: Danny Pack: Letalis: Vista
description: A client-side pack which adds a variety of new features to the game while still maintaining performance
body:
# Letalis: Vista is closed

Letalis: Vista (the server this pack was made for) has shut down 

# Danny Pack: Letalis: Vista
*For Quilt 1.20.1*

This pack is a Quilt-based that with the sole purpose of enhancing the user experience in a multitude of ways.

### Content

Danny Pack: Letalis Vista adds a substantial amount content to the game to give every type of player something they'd enjoy. For adventurers you have the option of using [Xaero's mapping mods](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) or [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) (disabled by default) to map your adventure and keep track of the places you find. For those who wish to better express themselves there is [Wildfire's Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender)* . For those who just can't keep track of item recipes there is [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei). For those who love the immersion of proximity chat there is [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)* . For those who just love stylizing there is [Cosmetica](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetica). For those who just want to do funny dances there is [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft)* . And for those who love creating cinematics of their world there is [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod).

**Note: Wildfire's Female Gender Mod, Simple Voice Chat, and Emotecraft all require server side mods or plugins for others to be able to see your emotes, breasts, or speak through voice chat.*


### Performance

Despite the large amount of content mods and enhancements that this pack includes it still preforms excellently compared to vanilla. This increased performance is in large part due to mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), and many others which are provided in the list below.


### OptiFine Parity

This pack supports a majority of OptiFine features. [Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris), [zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify), [dynamic lighting](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights), [custom items textures](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn), and many more.


### Enhancements

To get around pesky server-side render distances this pack includes [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby). Bobby saves chunks as you go through them, this means that you can view unupdated versions of these chunks even when they are not within server render distance.

[Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot) adds an option to take 4K screenshots simply by pressing F9. This is especiallt useful when taking screenshots with shaders.

Have you ever been annoyed by how small Minecart's default chat history is? With the [MoreChatHistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) mod you won't need to worry about this problem again. 

Ever find that Minecraft just doesn't have enough unique animations? Well the developers at [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) seem to agree with you, which is why they added a whole batch of fresh animations to Minecraft.

### Why this pack?

While this pack will never be as performant as packs like [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized), this pack has a draw which make it the best for me and hopefully others. This draw is that it maintains high FPS while having loads of extra content that benefit the user experience. This content makes it pretty much ready and easy to be used for my use case which is private survival servers with friends.

#

Notice: **Some mods in this pack my violate the rules of servers (for example Xareo's Minimap or some aspects of MouseWheelie). Please ensure to review the rules of servers you will be playing on with this pack.** (All mods within  this pack are allowed on Letalis: Vista)

## Contents

*If you wish to use any of these mods outside of this pack please download them directly from their mod pages*

### Mods:

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Adds 3D to player skin rendering
- [AdvancementInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo) - Provides more detailed information about advancement requirements
- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) - Adds support for Optifine animated textures 
- [AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost) - Gets rid of ghost blocks through /ghost
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Improves food HUD
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - Dependency of mods in this pack
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - Displays the statistics of mounted animals
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Displays ping in ms within the player menu
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - Statistics screen improvements
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Allows for viewing chunks beyond server view-distance
- [Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - Allows for borderless fullscreen
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - Shows player heads beside chat messages
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) - Allows for custom item textures
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Dependency of mods in this pack
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Adds connected textures
- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) - Adds controller support
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Adds a search bar to the key-bindings menu
- [Cosmetica](https://modrinth.com/mod/cosmetica) - Free cosmetics
- [CraftPresence](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftpresence) - Discord Rich Presence
- [Craftify](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftify) - In game music integrations
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Fixes many Minecraft bugs
- [Drippy Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/drippy-loading-screen) - Custom loading screen
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) - Allows for anyone to join a LAN world
- [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft) - Adds free emotes
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Improves block entities
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - Adds support for Optifine custom entities
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Adds further Optifine entity features
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Hides entities that are not visible to increase performance
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - Dependency of mods in this pack
- [FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) - Allows for custom skybox definitions by resource packs
- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot) - Creates high resolution screenshots (F9)
- [Fadeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless) - Removes fade out animations
- [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu) - Custom menu screen
- [FastQuit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastquit) -Allows you to return to the title screen while a world is still saving
- [Wildfire's Female Gender Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/female-gender) - Adds more player model variations
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory optimizations
- [FabricSkyBoxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes-interop/version/mc1.17.1-1.0.0) - Allows FSB to work with Optifine skies
- [Hold That Chunk](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-that-chunk) - Delays chunk unloading
- [Horse Stats Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/mod/horsestatsvanilla) - Displays more information about horses
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speeds up immediate mode rendering
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Adds Sodium support for the Fabric Rendering API
- [Inspecio](https://modrinth.com/mod/inspecio) - Improved tooltips
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Adds support for shaders
- [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - Information about what you are looking at (disabled by default)
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - Lets you view items and recipes
- [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) - Map and minimap (disabled by default)
- [Just Enough Professions](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-professions-jep) - Shows profession workstations in JEI
- [Just Enough Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer) - Shows resource information in JEI
- [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) - Dependency of mods in this pack
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Dynamic lighting
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces language load times
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) - Faster booting
- [Light Overlay](https://modrinth.com/mod/light-overlay) - Light level overlay (F7)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - Optimization
- [Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - Fixes memory leaks
- [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) - Dependency of mods in this pack
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in block and item models
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a menu that shows a list of mods
- [MoreChatHistory](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) - Increases chat history
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - Changes how culling is handled to increase performance
- [Mouse Wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie) - Adds inventory management features
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Removes chat reporting when possible
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - Adds more animations
- [Not Enough Crashes](https://modrinth.com/mod/notenoughcrashes) - Improves how Minecraft crashes
- [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) - Adds custom inventory GUI support
- [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) - Provides a config for Optifine replacement mods
- [Quilted Fabric API (QFAPI) / Quilt Standard Libraries](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) - Quilt standard libraries
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Sodium options menu
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) - Allows for in game recordings
- [Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) - Makes resource packs load in the background
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables) - Dependency of mods in this pack
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Adds features to Sodium
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Massively improved rendering engine
- [Simple HUD Enhanced](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-hud-enhanced) - Armour, durability, and effect HUD
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) - Adds Voice Chat for server that support it
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Full screen world map
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Minimap
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - Dependency of mods in this pack
- [Your Options Shall Be Respected](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr) - Used to ensure settings and configs wont be overwritten in pack updates
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - Used for zooming in on where you are looking

### Resource Packs:

- [Chat Reporting Helper](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chat-reporting-helper) - Helps explain chat reporting
- [Fast Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fast-better-grass) - Puts grass and similar textures on the sides of their blocks
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) - Adds more animations
- [Pride Bees!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pride-bees) - Pride Bees!
